description_long: This object is a weathered stone grave marker set on a rectangular base surrounded by a patch of green grass. The main structure is a solid, arched-topped headstone with intricate, shallow relief carvings featuring repeated arch motifs and floral patterns on its front and sides. The stone surface is aged, with visible discoloration and some erosion, giving it a historic and somber appearance. The base is slightly elevated and rectangular, providing stability and separating the headstone from the surrounding grass. The grass appears lush and well-maintained, contrasting with the stark white and gray tones of the stone. There are no visible inscriptions or symbols on the headstone, and no additional grave markers, crosses, or mausoleums are present.
description: A weathered, arched stone grave marker with carved relief patterns, set on a rectangular base surrounded by green grass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main face of the headstone with three arched relief carvings and the grassy base.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the headstone and the continuation of the carved patterns along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the headstone and the rectangular grassy base.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other side's relief carvings and the thickness of the stone.
